subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1916-05-15 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: This doth beguile thee. How canst thou entrust the garden unto him? 'Tis as though thou wouldst commit the meat unto the care of the cat [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این تو را گول می زند.  چطور باغ را به او می سپاری.  مثل اینست که گوشت را بدست گربه بسپاری
subcodes.subjects: @humor; jokes, @Shaykhis, @stories; anecdotes, @four pillars, @Islamic laws and jurisprudence, @growth of the Cause, @praise of Western values; culture, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
